name: The White House
subject: Results drown out spin
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=32a8228bc0ab726f0d9256e9b523bf911e186dcca536110e62ba2cb81882c1636eb38c96b47271c9872cecab423f3d14484f4d57c83c9704

Results drown out spin

On January 11, less than three weeks after President Donald J. Trump signed the most sweeping tax overhaul in American history, House Minority Leader Nancy Pelosi (D-CA) labeled the benefits that American workers are seeing as “crumbs.”

That comment hasn’t aged well. According to a New York Times poll conducted by SurveyMonkey this month, a majority of Americans approve of the tax law signed by President Trump in December. There is little mystery why. As of this week, 377 companies have announced worker bonuses, raises, or 401(k) boosts as a result of tax cuts, according to the nonprofit Americans for Tax Reform.

Even some Democrats are breaking from Rep. Pelosi’s line. “I wouldn't say a couple thousand dollars a year is ‘crumbs,’” Rep. John Yarmuth (D-KY) said. He’s exactly right.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=32a8228bc0ab726f4865b5ae45b66a72717aa2172aeb1b4df70050f99343f000d959899f7a984f3febeacd613f2b5b118fca6741cc09534a
More Democrats should take note: On tax cuts, Americans believe results more than spin.

Watch President Trump speak live at CPAC at 10:05 a.m. ET

The Trump Administration is making a strong showing this week at the Conservative Political Action Conference’s 2018 annual meeting. The lineup includes Vice President Mike Pence, Secretary of Energy Rick Perry, Budget Director Mick Mulvaney, and other senior Administration officials.

Today, President Trump joins that list with a keynote address to the conference.

“I stand here today with profound gratitude to say that because of all of you, because of the conservative majorities in Congress that you helped elect, and because of the strong leadership of the President you put in the White House, 2017 was the most consequential year in the history of the conservative movement,” Vice President Pence told CPAC attendees yesterday.

“And tomorrow, you’ll hear firsthand from the man who galvanized that movement.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=32a8228bc0ab726f5cf3be7eaedef6b8424899590a28e12c202712848e1dce565a96304bc5a0dd38eb6eaaf7123a8219328b62d43231da48
Watch President Trump’s CPAC speech live at 10:05 ET.

Bipartisan support builds for the President’s infrastructure plan

Two senators from opposite sides of the aisle—Sen. Jim Inhofe (R-OK) and Sen. Sheldon Whitehouse (D-RI)—
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=32a8228bc0ab726f9fad5f202f94d6e601f20aba811a255c9541622232770126cc3da9f73ec4652c6231df7c4b56bb1867e57d1288403e24
took to The Wall Street Journal this week to join the President’s call for a bipartisan infrastructure bill.

“During his State of the Union address, President Trump called for a broad bipartisan infrastructure package, pledging to improve the nation’s infrastructure and invest in the future,” the pair wrote. “We know that it can, and will, happen.”

The senators are right—and most Americans agree. According to a new Rasmussen Reports poll, 65 percent of likely voters favor President Trump’s bold plan to rebuild American infrastructure. That plan starts with
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=32a8228bc0ab726f0a0d4376578d7e942c6450325b8f6dfe78d1447ebfb68fbc5ff8856081e5a5abfad7be1e401fff62d7ba4ce2574d6a68
getting Washington out of the way. “Americans should welcome news that President Trump has included regulatory streamlining in his infrastructure proposal,” the editorial board of The Oklahoman writes.

Learn more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=32a8228bc0ab726f1be6a1c65204a5e6bfec4efa2f6c61abd0732d3d1515a4f43a639b0bbc8ac1c4ad990407ea3811f814aab8e566397eb2
Support continues to build for President Trump’s infrastructure plan.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump meets with state and local officials to discuss school safety | February 22, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

POTUS TODAY

This afternoon, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump will welcome Prime Minister Malcolm Turnbull and Mrs. Turnbull of Australia to the White House. The two leaders will meet before participating in a working lunch, and later hold a joint press conference. In the afternoon, the President will meet with Secretary of State Rex Tillerson.

Today, Vice President Pence and the Second Lady will host a luncheon for members of the National Governors Association. The Vice President will later participate in a meeting with Prime Minister Turnbull.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=32a8228bc0ab726f328d7b6971138b88ee387bc4513314e8f24da02cf0ca3fc3c9f75ccdd045223afdf211ddc219ccacd88560ccbcbc35b0

Contact the White House |

name: Anne Holton
subject: Tim is turning 60!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek -

In just a few days, my husband Tim will turn 60 years old. Can you believe it? Sometimes it feels like just yesterday that I was meeting him for the first time in law school. Other times it feels like we've lived ten different lifetimes together.

Tim and I have been so blessed throughout our lives. We've been able to raise three healthy, beautiful kids into smart and successful adults; we've been able to continue the tradition of service we were raised with; we've had opportunities to meet, become friends with, and learn from so many people. And there's no one I'd rather have by my side for all of those blessings - and for the speed bumps and hardships that all families go through - than Tim. He's kind, thoughtful, funny, smart... and I might be biased, but I'd say he's pretty easy on the eyes, too. :)

**To celebrate his birthday, his campaign team and I are joining up to get as many of his friends to sign his card as possible. If you haven't had a chance yet, will you add your name?** [**Click here to sign.**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=McnwzNII8U%2F2Wmus4PfY1kGBR7dkNzEt)

Birthdays are funny things - some people dread them, other people count down the minutes until their next celebration. But no matter how you feel about them, to be given 60 years on this earth is a pretty cool thing.

**So let's celebrate!** [**Follow this link to sign Tim's birthday card today.**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=I7f69clmownbIoLpwnVLYjX%2FlfNQD4%2Bi)

Thanks!

Anne

| | [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=4sLysJHshFMtSFiQsnO9aTX%2FlfNQD4%2Bi)

| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=8w%2F5G3jvBWhHhM1iS5xZdzX%2FlfNQD4%2Bi).

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Turning up the temp (need your help)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress***
body:
Friends,

The temperature is going up on our planet. Literally. With our miles of coastline, climate change and rising sea levels are a major threat to generations of Florida families.

Together, it's time to turn up the temperature on Scott Pruitt and the Trump administration to do something about it.

Thousands signed on to demand Pruitt and Trump stop denying climate change and start taking action. You were one of them -- and I can't thank you enough. Today, I'm asking you to take your support a step further.

Chip in $5, $10, or more to help us reach our $20,000 February goal and grow our grassroots efforts.

Thousands signed on to demand Pruitt and Trump stop denying climate change and start taking action. Today, I'm asking you to add your name to the list.

Sign the petition >>

https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180218

Pruitt's led the EPA for an entire year, and all he's done is wasted taxpayer dollars on expensive flights and scrubbed his agency's website of climate change references.

Thank you for joining me and demanding more from the leader of the EPA.

Debbie
----

name: Bob Casey
subject: favor, please
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate
body:
Important update for you, it'll just take a minute:

I just got off the phone with my campaign manager, and she told me that we are about $62,000 short of where we need to be at this point in the fundraising quarter. Right now, my staff is debating between cutting our advertising budget, hiring fewer staff, or making smaller investments in our field operation to close that gap.

That worries me, to tell you the truth, because ever since I voted against the GOP's tax scheme, they've really stepped up their attacks against me. I sided with working families, not corporations or billionaires, and national Republicans aren't happy about that. President Trump even endorsed my opponent earlier this month, signaling to his far-right allies that it's time to go all-in on Pennsylvania.

You've probably already heard that Democrats can take back Congress in 2018 and put a stop to the president's dangerous anti-middle-class agenda. But that will not happen if Republicans take over this Senate seat in Pennsylvania, so we need to close our $62,000 budget gap this week.

**Supporters like you are already making a huge difference in this race. It would mean a lot if you could take it a step further and become a campaign donor by chipping in $5 or more by midnight to help keep this race competitive.**

**Here 's the link: _[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6a36/51dbcc2a/a63bd1d/3a30879/3266473237/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiYm9iLWNhc2V5IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDIyM19mcl9uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180223_fr_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

name: Stewart for Senate
subject: we need your help.....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stewart for Senate, Inc
body:
| [](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_22sig_drive&n=1)
---
Peter --

Corey is fighting every day to #TakeBackVA from the unhinged left who want to raise your taxes, make Virginia a sanctuary state, and take away your Second Amendment rights. That is why - we must get Corey's name on the ballot. Thousands of volunteers have been collecting signatures across the Commonwealth and we're almost at our goal, _**BUT we must reach our goal of 1000 more before the end of February.**_ _**Can you help us collect 10, 25, 50, or even 100 signatures before the end of February?**_ FIVE volunteers, who send in the most signatures before the final deadline, will win a FREE STEAK DINNER at Corey's home. You must enter here >>> [Dinner with Corey ](https://www.coreystewart.com/834/dinnerwithcorey?utm_campaign=signature_drive&utm_medium=email&utm_source=coreystewartusa&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_22sig_drive&n=2) _**If you have signatures now, please mail them to our P.O. Box as soon as possible!** _We're asking volunteers to mail in their signatures periodically as we near our goal! Make sure they're notarized and mail them to our P.O. Box below today! In case you haven't, or need a refresher, print out your petition forms and check out the instructions on collecting ballot signatures below: Download your ballot petition signature form [HERE](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.coreystewart.com%2Fpdf%2Fstewart_pqv.pdf%3Froi%3Decho3-48663971534-45737710-dd6a78e35db9dd6518ab51bdd4b78b80%26&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_22sig_drive&n=3) \- * **_must print front and back on the same page!_**
Download and read your instructions [HERE](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsupport.coreystewart.com%2Fpdf%2FStewart-01022018.pdf&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_22sig_drive&n=4).
* Make sure to read the instructions carefully.
* Then, ask your family, friends, and co-workers to sign the petition.
* Go to your local Farmers Market, Grocery Store, or anywhere there's foot traffic to collect signatures.
* Get 10, 25, or even 50 by the end of the month!
* Get your signature forms notarized at your local bank or post office.
* Mail in your signatures by the end of one of our deadlines!
* Mail petition forms to the campaign P.O. Box or turn into your local Regional Director.

Stewart for Senate
P.O. Box 7090
Woodbridge, VA 22195 **_Any volunteer who mails in more than 25 signatures post-marked by March 1st will receive a free Stewart for Senate T-Shirt and Bumper Sticker!_** Win a free dinner with Corey and his wife, Maria, at his home! The top 5 volunteers who turn in the most signatures by the March 10th deadline will win. BUT - you must enter here to win >>> [Dinner with Corey](https://www.coreystewart.com/834/dinnerwithcorey?utm_campaign=signature_drive&utm_medium=email&utm_source=coreystewartusa&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_22sig_drive&n=5) REMEMBER - You do not have to turn them all at once. All volunteer signatures will count towards their personal total. We ask that you turn your signatures in at our deadlines on Feb. 28th, and March 10th or once you have 50, whichever comes first. The 25 signatures for t-shirts WILL count towards your dinner with Corey contest total should you enter via the link above. Your signatures will ONLY count to your total if your signature form is:
1. **Notarized, and**
2. Mailed in or turned into your regional director by the deadlines above.

If you cannot collect signatures, please consider [donating $10, $25, or even $50 to help us defeat Tim Kaine](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.campaignsolutions.com%2Fstewart%2Flist%2Fwebsite%2Fdonation1%2F%3FInitiativeKey%3DTBDNGA8661SN&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_22sig_drive&n=6) and #TakeBackVA. Please email Heather Mitchell for further questions or guidance at Heather@CoreyStewart.com Best, Team Corey Stewart for Senate
[http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_22sig_drive&n=7)

| | Paid for by Stewart for Senate, Inc.____
---
Stewart for Senate · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_22sig_drive&n=8).

Created with [NationBuilder](https://coreystewartusa.nationbuilder.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fnationbuilder.com&e=ed823c4651e3363eb3aaad58e45e9481&utm_source=coreystewartusa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_22sig_drive&n=9), software for leaders.

body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- _The Huffington Post just released some startling news:_ | [](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf00/73a2bc12/3e9b2077/1fcc8d79/2171782741/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-sued-gerrymandering?utm_campaign=em18_180223_gopsu_fnd_clq_act_ger_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180223_gopsu_fnd_clq_act_ger_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=auto&amount=25&utm_content=1") **["Pennsylvania GOP Pleads With SCOTUS Again To Let Them Use Gerrymandered Map"](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf00/73a2bc12/3e9b2077/1fcc8d78/2171782741/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-sued-gerrymandering?utm_campaign=em18_180223_gopsu_fnd_clq_act_ger_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180223_gopsu_fnd_clq_act_ger_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=auto&amount=25&utm_content=2+-+ldquoPennsylvania+GOP+Pleads+With+SCOTUS")**

Republicans just launched a last-ditch effort to keep their gerrymandered map in place.

We are furious -- _and we won 't stand for it. _So we're building our grassroots movement to fight back, and if we're going to succeed, we need you to be a part of it.
**[If you 're with us, pitch in $5 to show you're standing with Governor Tom Wolf and the fight to end gerrymandering:](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ecf00/73a2bc12/3e9b2077/1fcc8d7f/2171782741/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-sued-gerrymandering?utm_campaign=em18_180223_gopsu_fnd_clq_act_ger_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wolf&source=em18_180223_gopsu_fnd_clq_act_ger_&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recurring=auto&amount=25&utm_content=3+-+If+yoursquore+with+us+pitch+in+5+to+show")**

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Organizing like Bernie
body:
#
Friends,
Big ideas take hold when people organize.
That's why Senator Bernie Sanders and I are rallying crowds in Illinois and Michigan this weekend to strengthen the work being done by **551 Our Revolution local groups and counting.**
[**Chip in $5 right now to help us continue to organize across the country.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acc3/bed43eb/46180dce/75fefd6d/2498266993/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em180223")
So far, over 100 Our Revolution-endorsed candidates have been elected to office. This new generation of progressives is creating policies and revitalizing constituent engagement to make sure our voices are heard. And in 2018, we're taking Senator Bernie Sanders' cue by focusing our efforts on the local and state elections that affect the issues closest to your communities. **With your help, we're going to make 2018 our most successful year yet.**
Many of Our Revolution-endorsed candidates are already in heated primary races--some with elections that are just days or weeks away. Your support right now for the local groups helping these candidates can make the difference.
[**Can you chip in $5 to Our Revolution today?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7acc3/bed43eb/46180dce/75fefd6d/2498266993/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-2018?refcode=em180223")
Senator Bernie Sanders' public service is based on principles, not party affiliation or labels. His career would not have been made possible were it not for a dedicated group of grassroots activists and volunteers who helped him along the way. Instead of relying on party leaders for instruction, he listens to the people who matter most--you. With your help today, we can make this possible for hundreds of revolutionary candidates across the country.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution

603 2ND ST, NE

| | Friends,

subject: Indiana Joe or DC Donnelly?
body:
This week, our U.S. Senate candidates took center stage. Former State Rep. Mike Braun, Congressman Luke Messer and Congressman Todd Rokita... | | |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=adf0def4bc&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Indiana Joe or DC Donnelly?_** This week, our three Republican U.S. Senate candidates took center stage. **Former State Rep. Mike Braun, Congressman Luke Messer** and **Congressman Todd Rokita** came together for the first U.S. Senate primary debate. Hearing these three candidates make their case to Hoosiers, it's crystal clear to me that with the depth of experience and great ideas they each put forward, come January one of these three candidates will be sworn in as Indiana's new junior senator.

But until that day comes, we continue to be plagued with the confusing tale of Democrat Joe Donnelly, which took another strange twist this week.

You might remember last week, when Democrat Donnelly sent out a press release claiming that he votes in line with President Donald Trump's priorities 62% of the the time. Well, this week he dramatically reversed course, sending out an email to his liberal donors attacking our own **Vice President Mike Pence**!

It's really the tale of two Democrat Donnellys. We've got Indiana Joe -- who claims to support President Trump and who, late last year, said that Trump's voters were his voters. But then there's DC Donnelly -- the Donnelly who says that Trump voters aren't "who America is" (just weeks after saying they're his voters) and who attacks Vice President Pence.

Democrat Donnelly is trying to fool Hoosiers into thinking he's everything to everyone. But we know the truth. It's DC Donnelly who's voting in Washington, and he's taking orders from his party boss Chuck Schumer, not from Hoosiers.

The contrast is clear. Hoosiers will have the choice in November to vote for our Republican nominee -- either Braun, Messer or Rokita \-- or Democrat Donnelly, who changes his mind more frequently than the weather changes in Indiana.

But until then, we'll be working tirelessly to help Hoosiers look beyond the Indiana Joe they hear from in Indiana, so that they can truly see the true, indecisive, Democrat stripes of DC Donnelly.

-Kyle Hupfer
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
|
**_Governor Holcomb's People Focus_** Yesterday, Governor Eric Holcomb delivered moving remarks at the the annual Indiana Prayer Breakfast. At its heart, his speech focused on the same thing that drives his work as our governor, and that focus is _people, people, people_.

As the 2018 Legislative Session reaches its home stretch, Governor Holcomb is working to help provide our fellow Hoosiers with a leg-up through great workforce training programs -- including the services offered at [many workforce development facilities he's toured over the last few weeks](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f4e80e8d7b&e=1acd9bb3d6) \-- and through a empathetic, solution-based approach to [helping those suffering from opioid addiction](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=445b10e74c&e=1acd9bb3d6).

And today, as many Hoosiers are now facing massive flooding in their communities, Governor Holcomb hit the road to visit Northern Indiana, meeting with local leaders, first responders and volunteers in St. Joseph and Elkhart counties.
---
|
---

clean_body: This week, our U.S. Senate candidates took center stage. Former State Rep. Mike Braun, Congressman Luke Messer and Congressman Todd Rokita... | | | | | | | Indiana Joe or DC Donnelly? This week, our three Republican U.S. Senate candidates took center stage. Former State Rep. Mike Braun, Congressman Luke Messer and Congressman Todd Rokita came together for the first U.S. Senate primary debate. Hearing these three candidates make their case to Hoosiers, it's crystal clear to me that with the depth of experience and great ideas they each put forward, come January one of these three candidates will be sworn in as Indiana's new junior senator. But until that day comes, we continue to be plagued with the confusing tale of Democrat Joe Donnelly, which took another strange twist this week. You might remember last week, when Democrat Donnelly sent out a press release claiming that he votes in line with President Donald Trump's priorities 62% of the the time. Well, this week he dramatically reversed course, sending out an email to his liberal donors attacking our own Vice President Mike Pence! It's really the tale of two Democrat Donnellys. We've got Indiana Joe -- who claims to support President Trump and who, late last year, said that Trump's voters were his voters. But then there's DC Donnelly -- the Donnelly who says that Trump voters aren't "who America is" (just weeks after saying they're his voters) and who attacks Vice President Pence. Democrat Donnelly is trying to fool Hoosiers into thinking he's everything to everyone. But we know the truth. It's DC Donnelly who's voting in Washington, and he's taking orders from his party boss Chuck Schumer, not from Hoosiers. The contrast is clear. Hoosiers will have the choice in November to vote for our Republican nominee -- either Braun, Messer or Rokita \-- or Democrat Donnelly, who changes his mind more frequently than the weather changes in Indiana. But until then, we'll be working tirelessly to help Hoosiers look beyond the Indiana Joe they hear from in Indiana, so that they can truly see the true, indecisive, Democrat stripes of DC Donnelly. -Kyle Hupfer | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Governor Holcomb's People Focus Yesterday, Governor Eric Holcomb delivered moving remarks at the the annual Indiana Prayer Breakfast. **_A Note From Jeanie_**
**Dear Derek,**

**All across the country, people are shocked and saddened by the senseless tragedy in Florida last week. In the days following the Parkland shooting, President Trump[addressed the Nation](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyAIFNmz-2BSCD7X0Xpy-2BMqeKynYkgYwB8DUTUpm3Tzye-2FRam5XNop7sJ0kFAS7Z0ZGyw-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MoZqfPlPBM3A5xjwDkiGfHKUiU-2B-2BWgUL-2FHMd-2BbMf2YM4aTcDvsshouuESHtamGzxXb-2BYFoPdVFT7xB8QEnWiB9VVaDUi3jeXlEQm3ZR-2FCKEKwQO7gb8yGCUSK79hGQptU3EjtVXCWiSA-2BOAl4ph6pkZr0MDwSGohbkKLJ4KQKC-2Bhw-2FaKMoWqv-2Fz1A6Osj-2FYbnFZ92cZSHv72Kb0Om-2Fdra8c1khXY1eiRMGIt5iUKv-2FmMBcCzeJANm87OS0G8B6JrggE9QId0KLkTUpxKZ7o-2BZ-2BA-3D-3D) and [issued a Proclamation](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyOjIesYJFWT3v-2BLoSZZM67A2NTDl-2Fc3EzLnTn3uI7cQDI-2FLIfMoV2bhyahZENOt6rVyZMW-2BmEuc0UyXvzPZyVQh3OeY4vS7cjlhctQqi7b2wQ-2FgdwY9Hg9LUvSC-2BOMI3oVyoOurpCv-2FzKhmcoWCAloQ-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MoZqfPlPBM3A5xjwDkiGfHKUiU-2B-2BWgUL-2FHMd-2BbMf2YM4aTcDvsshouuESHtamGzxXb-2BYFoPdVFT7xB8QEnWiB9eEGq30u0de0g8Q4-2BptBI2iFfFZU7gkyxqDiWfYIF-2FK46R4wg0x2lX9T4yHIVe-2Fcw4xbydbenEh1izgAe-2Bvj8gRvwnTKkO2ZCZ9os0UbVEiOiBPpuEshNUePOGvU-2F9Lvdcw0FEpd9SiaO-2FM6BZBZKoIjCIxSfcievZiEeINmXoDwcgyBdK2oawS-2BRVUrGIvVyA-3D-3D) honoring the victims and their loved ones. He also spoke with Sen. John Cornyn (R-TX), who proposed legislation to strengthen the Federal background check system.**

**This Wednesday, President Trump along with VP Mike Pence and Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos met with a large group of students, teachers, and community leaders to talk about how we need to improve safety at our schools. The President committed to finding “real, workable solutions to end the violence.” **
****
**Here in New Hampshire, thanks to the leadership of Governor Sununu and the legislature, $20 million in grants have been invested specifically for security measures for our schools.**
****
**_“We invested $20 million in grants this year already specifically for security measures for schools. Nearly $16 million has already been sent back to local school districts for security improvement upgrades. These are cameras, emergency plans, and new secure entranceways, so that we know our kids will be safe. What else matters? We have put a real focus on that. These investments will also offset other property taxes that would have had to pay for these measures. When you're talking about crises like this, one is too many, and we are working hard to make New Hampshire’s schools the safest in the nation.”_ – Governor Chris Sununu**
****
**It is reassuring to know that both the President and our Governor have the safety and security of our children as a top priority.**

**Sincerely, **

**Jeanie**

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, FEBRUARY 23rd | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, All across the country, people are shocked and saddened by the senseless tragedy in Florida last week. In the days following the Parkland shooting, President Trump and honoring the victims and their loved ones. He also spoke with Sen. John Cornyn (R-TX), who proposed legislation to strengthen the Federal background check system. This Wednesday, President Trump along with VP Mike Pence and Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos met with a large group of students, teachers, and community leaders to talk about how we need to improve safety at our schools. The President committed to finding “real, workable solutions to end the violence.” ** Here in New Hampshire, thanks to the leadership of Governor Sununu and the legislature, $20 million in grants have been invested specifically for security measures for our schools. “We invested $20 million in grants this year already specifically for security measures for schools. Nearly $16 million has already been sent back to local school districts for security improvement upgrades. These are cameras, emergency plans, and new secure entranceways, so that we know our kids will be safe. What else matters? We have put a real focus on that. These investments will also offset other property taxes that would have had to pay for these measures. When you're talking about crises like this, one is too many, and we are working hard to make New Hampshire’s schools the safest in the nation.” – Governor Chris Sununu It is reassuring to know that both the President and our Governor have the safety and security of our children as a top priority.
